scenario: LiteLLM work session - audit every provider config affected before reworking the base chat-transformation contract

steps.name: Map the base transformation contract and what it defines
Enumerate every provider config affected by the contract change
Group the affected provider configs by how they inherit
Assess the blast radius of the contract change
Surface the non-obvious affected provider configs
